MELItem.Title: Forward Cargo Air Conditioning (FCAC) Supply Valve (787-10: VN-A872, VN-A873, VN-A874, VN-A875, VN-A876, VN-A877, VN-A878, VN-A879)

ListItem.Para: Forward cargo heat diverter valve is deactivated closed.

MaintenanceProcedure.Para: Deactivate the forward cargo air conditioning supply valve closed and deactivate the forward cargo heat diverter valve closed (AMM DDG 21-54-06).

ListItem.Para: Set (P5) FWD CARGO TEMP switch OFF.
Deactivate the forward cargo air conditioning supply valve closed.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:
Gain access to the forward cargo air conditioning supply valve.
Turn the open/close knob until the valve is in the CLOSED position.
Deactivate forward cargo heat diverter valve closed.
Using a flight deck multi-function display only, open the following circuit breakers and lock with an INOP tag:

Note.Para: The CARGO HEAT DIVERT FWD VLV status message will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Gain access to forward cargo heat diverter valve.
Turn the open/close knob until the valve is in the CLOSED position.

Note.Para: The CARGO A/C FWD Advisory will be displayed.

ListItem.Para: Forward cargo cooling is not available. Temperature sensitive cargo that requires cooling should not be carried in the forward cargo compartment.
Forward cargo heat operates normally. Set FCAC ON for forward cargo heat to operate.
